allow: Bash(powershell.exe -Command "Get-Command cc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Format-List; Get-Alias cc -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Get-Content \\$PROFILE 2>\\$null | Select-String -Pattern 'cc|claude' -CaseSensitive")

Bash(powershell.exe -Command '$profiles = @\($PROFILE.AllUsersAllHosts, $PROFILE.AllUsersCurrentHost, $PROFILE.CurrentUserAllHosts, $PROFILE.CurrentUserCurrentHost\); foreach \($p in $profiles\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { echo "=== $p ==="; Get-Content $p } }')

Bash(taskkill //F //IM electron.exe 2>/dev/null; taskkill //F //IM node.exe 2>/dev/null; sleep 2; powershell.exe -Command 'Start-Process powershell -ArgumentList "-NoExit", "-Command", "cd C:\\src\\agentplex; pnpm start"')

Bash(GH_HOST=github.com gh pr create --repo AlexPeppas/agentplex --head KennyTurtle:feature/project-launcher-smart-resume --base master --title "Add project launcher and smart resume" --body "$\(cat <<''EOF'':*)
